subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the peerless Beloved, Who, through His all-embracing mercy, summoneth all created beings unto everlasting life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب بیزوالی را سزاست که از رحمت واسعه جمیع بریه را بحیوه باقیه دعوت میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @development of capacity and readiness, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
